title: Maharshi Dayanand University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Maharshi Dayanand University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Maharshi Dayanand University Result 2026 Out for 1st and 3rd Semester M.Sc Computer Science (Data Science & Machine Learning), MA English (Hons 5-Year) Reappear, BA Multidisciplinary, BSc Life/Physical Sciences, BBA, B.Sc Honours and other NEP certificate courses on the official website - mdu.ac.in on 10-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Maharshi Dayanand University result.

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak has officially released the MDU Result 2026 for various UG NEP semester examinations including 1st and 3rd semester courses. The latest update covers BBA (Hospitality & Services Management - Aedp), BBA (CAM) 4-Year NEP, BBA 4-Year NEP, multiple Certificate Courses, BA NEP 4-Year programmes, BSc NEP courses and other UG results declared for the 2026 academic session.Maharshi Dayanand University Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - result.mdu.ac.in.

Students can check and download their MDU UG NEP semester results by visiting the official result portal and logging in with their registration number and roll number as required on the result page.After downloading the online marksheet, candidates must carefully verify their personal details, course and semester, subject-wise marks, total marks and result status. In case of any discrepancy in the MDU Result 2026, students should immediately contact the university examination branch or their respective college for necessary corrections.

sections.heading: Maharshi Dayanand University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University has declared MDU Result 2026 for a wide range of UG, PG and certificate programmes, including NEP-based 4-year degrees and reappear examinations for the 1st and 3rd semesters.

The latest result update covers M.Sc Computer Science (Data Science & Machine Learning), MA English (Hons 5-Year) Reappear, BA and B.Sc NEP programmes and multiple skill-based certificate courses, all accessible through the official MDU result portal.

rows: M.Sc Computer Science (Data Science & Machine Learning), MA English (Hons 5-Year) Reappear, BA Multidisciplinary, B.Sc Life Sciences, Physical Sciences, Sport Science, BBA (Hospitality & Services Management - AEDP) NEP, BBA 4-Year NEP, B.Sc Honours (Zoology, Physics, Chemistry, Bio-Tech, Genetics, Statistics, Maths), BA Honours/4-Year NEP (Psychology, Political Science, History, Hindi, Geography, English, Economics), Public Health Sciences and various certificate courses
Semester/Year 01 and 03 (and reappear 01, 03, 07, 10 for MA English Hons 5-Year)

links.label: Official Result Link

sections.heading: Maharshi Dayanand University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University has activated the direct online portal to check MDU Result 2026 for M.Sc, MA, BA, B.Sc, BBA, BPES, BFA and certificate courses. Students can use the link below to access the post-examination result panel.
By selecting the appropriate course and semester and entering their roll number and other required details, candidates can instantly view or download their result from the official portal.

links.label: M.Sc in Computer Science (Data Science & Machine Learning) Semester 01, 03 Result 2026
Master of Arts (English Hons 5-Year) Reappear Semester 01, 03, 07, 10 Result 2026
Bachelor of Arts (Multidisciplinary) Semester 01 and 03 Result 2026
Bachelor of Science (Sport Science) Semester 01 and 03 Result 2026
B.Sc (Life Sciences, Physical Sciences) Semester 01 and 03 Result 2026
BBA (Hospitality & Services Management - AEDP) NEP Semester 01 Result 2026
BBA (CAM) 4-Year NEP and BBA 4-Year NEP Semester 01 Result 2026
B.Sc Honours NEP (Zoology, Physics, Chemistry, Bio-Tech, Genetics, Statistics, Maths) Semester 03 Result 2026
BA/BA Honours NEP (Psychology, Political Science, History, Hindi, Geography, English, Economics, Public Administration) Semester 01 and 03 Result 2026

BPES, B.Sc Sport Science NEP, BFA (Painting) and various Certificate Courses (Waste Management, Indian Culture & History, Administration, Languages, AI & ML, 3D-Printing, Communication Skills, etc.) Semester 01 Result 2026
MDU Post Exam Result Portal (All Above Results)

sections.heading: How to Check MDU Result 2026 Online

items: Visit the official MDU result portal at result.mdu.ac.in.
On the result page, choose your course and semester from the available result list.
Enter your Registration Number and Roll Number in the respective fields.
Click on the Proceed or Submit button to view your result.
Your MDU Result 2026 marksheet will be displayed on the screen.
Check your name, course, semester, subject-wise marks and total marks carefully.
Download or print the provisional marksheet for future reference and verification.
